with little income and a perturbed m\nd-He will go on changing
professions. Saturn contacts Rahu at first, then Venus and the Moon
who exchange places with Mercury-Hence, he deals in drinks and
dresses and will carry on business in various places. He will also deal
in conveyances for the same reason as an employee in that concern. The
wife of the native will be sickly. He will get a bad name and will
inau' financial losses.
The disciple wants to know what happens when the Sun moves to the"
next house Cancer owned by the Moon and the Moon moves to Leo and,
therefore, will have exchange of places with the Sun and will contact Jupiter
placed there at birth. Does this have any specific significance?
The Master answers-The Sun, father of the native, visited the Palanin
temple. He was induced by his friend to seduce a woman there (Jupiter's
conjunction with Ketu" indicates the deity Subramanya). As a result of this
